title: EMEA Product Marketing Manager Arterial & Acute Haemodialysis
missing_skills: Medical device or vascular access experience
core_responsibilities: Develop strategic marketing plans including pricing, sales forecasts, market trend analysis
Plan and coordinate new product launches and product updates
Monitor competitor activity across EMEA, develop positioning strategies
Engage customers and KOLs to identify unmet needs
Collaborate with country sales teams providing tools, training, feedback loops
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Power BI PL-300 certification — required tool
Showcase product launch outcomes (4.6M CNY from 4 launches)
Stress KOL engagement and voice-of-customer research
Demonstrate sales enablement depth (training materials, demo scripts, collateral)
Mention Salesforce exposure if any exists
Frame cross-functional influence driving alignment across Marketing, Sales, Product
